new_terms.context: Charges for the electrical distribution network and the providers' regulated returns.
The pre-determined, regulated profit rate for T&D providers.
Services necessary to support the transmission of electric power from seller to purchaser.
The amount of electricity being drawn from the grid at a given time.
An auction held in advance to determine capacity prices for a future period.
The specific timeframe (e.g., 2025/26) during which the capacity must be available.
Additional charges added to the wholesale price by retail electricity providers.
